message.content:
<deliberation>
Scope: Evaluate REG-007 (Art9(3)), REG-021 (Art13(3)), REG-019 (Art13(1)) against the provided policy chunk about comment data (name, email, content, IP, user-agent), cookies, and indefinite retention for facilitating follow-up comments.
Cross-references considered:
- For Art9(3): Art9(1) and Art9(2)(h) context on special categories and health/social care exception.
- For Art13(3): Art13(2) items that must also be provided prior to further processing.
- For Art13(1): Art6(1) lawful bases and the transfer safeguards in Art46 and Art49(1).
Findings:
- Art9(3): The policy chunk concerns ordinary identifiers and technical data for comments, not special categories or processing by health professionals; no contradiction or narrowing detected; omissions are treated as Non-Deviation.
- Art13(3): No stated “further processing for another purpose” beyond comment functionality; no contradictory statement; omissions are Non-Deviation.
- Art13(1): The chunk does not provide many of the required disclosures (identity, legal basis, recipients, transfers, etc.), but per instructions omissions are Non-Deviation; no conflicting or negating statements detected.
Conclusion: No deviations identified for the evaluated nodes.
</deliberation>
